ashtroids.title: Ash-teroids
ashtroids.description: An interactive universe of projects, experiments, and ideas — orbiting one developer. Built with Next.js, Framer Motion, and procedurally generated asteroid textures.

manualProjects.title: Home Media Server
manualProjects.description: A complete self-hosted media stack: Plex, Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, and qBittorrent running on a Linux server with automated downloads and organization.

manualProjects.title: Building in Public
manualProjects.tagline: Thoughts on shipping, failing, and iterating
manualProjects.description: Notes and reflections on the process of building software — what worked, what didn't, and what I'd do differently.

manualProjects.title: Technical Notes
manualProjects.tagline: Things I learned the hard way
manualProjects.description: A living collection of technical notes, debugging stories, and hard-won knowledge from building real systems.
